name: Max Healthcare Institute Limited
summary: Max Healthcare Institute Limited provides healthcare services in India. It offers services in various specialties, including cancer care/oncology, liver transplant and biliary sciences, cardiac sciences, neuro sciences, orthopaedics, bariatric/weight loss surgery, minimal access/laparoscopic surgery, bone marrow transplant, kidney transplant, nephrology, and aesthetic and reconstructive surgery. As of August 31, 2020, the company operated a network of 17 healthcare facilities, including 11 state-of-the-art tertiary and quaternary care hospitals, one secondary care hospital, and five OPD and day care centers. The company is based in Gurugram, India.
